title: Histogram Statistics Analysis cannot apply on standby database
poc:
UPDATE HISTOGRAM ON id WITH 10 BUCKETS；
select * from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMN_STATISTICS;
key_bug_features: Histogram statistics not applied on standby database
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ANALYZE TABLE test2 UPDATE HISTOGRAM ON id WITH 5 BUCKETS;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test2 WHERE id IS NULL;
